action.reasoning: Observation: Val sweep found optimal ensemble params: weights(0.32,0.34,0.34), temps(0.9,1.5,1.5), logit_adjust_alpha=-0.30, improving val bal_acc from 0.8530 to 0.8640. Current predict.py doesn't use temperature scaling or logit adjustment. ResNet50 failed (0.397 val) so exclude it. Analysis: Temperature scaling + logit adjustment should significantly boost test balanced accuracy. Must save log_freq.pt to workspace since /data may not be available during eval. Decision: Save log_freq.pt, update predict.py with all optimizations, submit eval immediately.
